lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਕੇਦਾਰਾ ਬਾਣੀ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀਉ ਕੀ ॥
lines.translit: raag kedaaraa baanee kabeer jeeo kee |
lines.english: Raag Kaydaaraa, The Word Of Kabeer Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਸਤਤਿ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਦੋਊ ਬਿਬਰਜਿਤ ਤਜਹੁ ਮਾਨੁ ਅਭਿਮਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: ausatat nindaa doaoo bibarajit tajahu maan abhimaanaa |
lines.english: Those who ignore both praise and slander, who reject egotistical pride and conceit,

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਹਾ ਕੰਚਨੁ ਸਮ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਨਹਿ ਤੇ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਭਗਵਾਨਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: lohaa kanchan sam kar jaaneh te moorat bhagavaanaa |1|
lines.english: who look alike upon iron and gold - they are the very image of the Lord God. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਜਨੁ ਏਕੁ ਆਧੁ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: teraa jan ek aadh koee |
lines.english: Hardly anyone is a humble servant of Yours, O Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਬਿਬਰਜਿਤ ਹਰਿ ਪਦੁ ਚੀਨੑੈ ਸੋਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh lobh mohu bibarajit har pad cheenai soee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Ignoring sexual desire, anger, greed and attachment, such a person becomes aware of the Lord's Feet. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਜ ਗੁਣ ਤਮ ਗੁਣ ਸਤ ਗੁਣ ਕਹੀਐ ਇਹ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਭ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: raj gun tam gun sat gun kaheeai ih teree sabh maaeaa |
lines.english: Raajas, the quality of energy and activity; Taamas, the quality of darkness and inertia; and Satvas, the quality of purity and light, are all called the creations of Maya, Your illusion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਉਥੇ ਪਦ ਕਉ ਜੋ ਨਰੁ ਚੀਨੑੈ ਤਿਨੑ ਹੀ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: chauthe pad kau jo nar cheenai tina hee param pad paaeaa |2|
lines.english: That man who realizes the fourth state - he alone obtains the supreme state. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਅਰੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਚੂਕਾ ਚਿਤਵਤ ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: trisanaa ar maaeaa bhram chookaa chitavat aatam raamaa |3|
lines.english: Thirst and desire for Maya and doubt depart, remembering the Lord, the Supreme Soul. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਰਥ ਬਰਤ ਨੇਮ ਸੁਚਿ ਸੰਜਮ ਸਦਾ ਰਹੈ ਨਿਹਕਾਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: teerath barat nem such sanjam sadaa rahai nihakaamaa |
lines.english: Amidst pilgrimages, fasting, rituals, purification and self-discipline, he remains always without thought of reward.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਮੰਦਰਿ ਦੀਪਕੁ ਪਰਗਾਸਿਆ ਅੰਧਕਾਰੁ ਤਹ ਨਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: jih mandar deepak paragaasiaa andhakaar teh naasaa |
lines.english: When the temple is illuminated by the lamp, its darkness is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਨਹੀ ਬਨਜਿਆ ਕਾਂਸੀ ਤਾਂਬਾ ਕਿਨਹੀ ਲਉਗ ਸੁਪਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: kinahee banajiaa kaansee taanbaa kinahee laug supaaree |
lines.english: Some deal in bronze and copper, some in cloves and betel nuts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਭਉ ਪੂਰਿ ਰਹੇ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭਾਗਾ ਕਹਿ ਕਬੀਰ ਜਨ ਦਾਸਾ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: nirbhau poor rahe bhram bhaagaa keh kabeer jan daasaa |4|1|
lines.english: The Fearless Lord is All-pervading. Doubt has run away, says Kabeer, the Lord's humble slave. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਨਾਮ ਕੇ ਬਿਆਪਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: har ke naam ke biaapaaree |
lines.english: I am a trader in the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਹੁ ਬਨਜਿਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਗੋਬਿਦ ਕਾ ਐਸੀ ਖੇਪ ਹਮਾਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: santahu banajiaa naam gobid kaa aisee khep hamaaree |1|
lines.english: The Saints deal in the Naam, the Name of the Lord of the Universe. Such is my merchandise as well. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੀਰਾ ਹਾਥਿ ਚੜਿਆ ਨਿਰਮੋਲਕੁ ਛੂਟਿ ਗਈ ਸੰਸਾਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: heeraa haath charriaa niramolak chhoott gee sansaaree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The priceless diamond has come into my hands. I have left the world behind. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੇ ਲਾਏ ਤਉ ਸਚ ਲਾਗੇ ਸਾਚੇ ਕੇ ਬਿਉਹਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: saache laae tau sach laage saache ke biauhaaree |
lines.english: When the True Lord attached me, then I was attached to Truth. I am a trader of the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਹਿ ਰਤਨ ਜਵਾਹਰ ਮਾਨਿਕ ਆਪੈ ਹੈ ਪਾਸਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: aapeh ratan javaahar maanik aapai hai paasaaree |
lines.english: He Himself is the pearl, the jewel, the ruby; He Himself is the jeweller.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੀ ਬਸਤੁ ਕੇ ਭਾਰ ਚਲਾਏ ਪਹੁਚੇ ਜਾਇ ਭੰਡਾਰੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: saachee basat ke bhaar chalaae pahuche jaae bhanddaaree |2|
lines.english: I have loaded the commodity of Truth; It has reached the Lord, the Treasurer. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੈ ਦਹ ਦਿਸ ਆਪ ਚਲਾਵੈ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਹੈ ਬਿਆਪਾਰੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aapai deh dis aap chalaavai nihachal hai biaapaaree |3|
lines.english: He Himself spreads out in the ten directions. The Merchant is Eternal and Unchanging. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਬੈਲੁ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਪੈਡਾ ਗਿਆਨ ਗੋਨਿ ਭਰਿ ਡਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: man kar bail surat kar paiddaa giaan gon bhar ddaaree |
lines.english: My mind is the bull, and meditation is the road; I have filled my packs with spiritual wisdom, and loaded them on the bull.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤੁ ਕਬੀਰੁ ਸੁਨਹੁ ਰੇ ਸੰਤਹੁ ਨਿਬਹੀ ਖੇਪ ਹਮਾਰੀ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: kehat kabeer sunahu re santahu nibahee khep hamaaree |4|2|
lines.english: Says Kabeer, listen, O Saints: my merchandise has reached its destination! ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਮਤਵਾਰ ਮੇਰ ਸਰ ਭਾਠੀ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਧਾਰ ਚੁਆਵਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: man matavaar mer sar bhaatthee amrit dhaar chuaavau |1|
lines.english: Let your mind be intoxicated with the stream of Ambrosial Nectar which trickles down from the furnace of the Tenth Gate. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੀ ਕਲਵਾਰਿ ਗਵਾਰਿ ਮੂਢ ਮਤਿ ਉਲਟੋ ਪਵਨੁ ਫਿਰਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: ree kalavaar gavaar moodt mat ulatto pavan firaavau |
lines.english: You barbaric brute, with your primitive intellect - reverse your breath and turn it inward.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੋਲਹੁ ਭਈਆ ਰਾਮ ਕੀ ਦੁਹਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: bolahu bheea raam kee duhaaee |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, call on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੀਵਹੁ ਸੰਤ ਸਦਾ ਮਤਿ ਦੁਰਲਭ ਸਹਜੇ ਪਿਆਸ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: peevahu sant sadaa mat duralabh sahaje piaas bujhaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O Saints, drink in this wine forever; it is so difficult to obtain, and it quenches your thirst so easily. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਬਿਚਿ ਭਾਉ ਭਾਇ ਕੋਊ ਬੂਝਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਵੈ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: bhai bich bhaau bhaae koaoo boojheh har ras paavai bhaaee |
lines.english: In the Fear of God, is the Love of God. Only those few who understand His Love obtain the sublime essence of the Lord, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਤੇ ਘਟ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਸਭ ਹੀ ਮਹਿ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਪੀਆਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jete ghatt amrit sabh hee meh bhaavai tiseh peeaee |2|
lines.english: As many hearts as there are - in all of them, is His Ambrosial Nectar; as He pleases, He causes them to drink it in. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਕੁਟੀ ਛੂਟੈ ਦਸਵਾ ਦਰੁ ਖੂਲੑੈ ਤਾ ਮਨੁ ਖੀਵਾ ਭਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: trikuttee chhoottai dasavaa dar khoolai taa man kheevaa bhaaee |3|
lines.english: When the knot of the three qualities is untied, then the Tenth Gate opens up, and the mind is intoxicated, O Siblings of Destiny. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਗਰੀ ਏਕੈ ਨਉ ਦਰਵਾਜੇ ਧਾਵਤੁ ਬਰਜਿ ਰਹਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: nagaree ekai nau daravaaje dhaavat baraj rahaaee |
lines.english: There are nine gates to the one city of the body; restrain your mind from escaping through them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਭੈ ਪਦ ਪੂਰਿ ਤਾਪ ਤਹ ਨਾਸੇ ਕਹਿ ਕਬੀਰ ਬੀਚਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: abhai pad poor taap teh naase keh kabeer beechaaree |
lines.english: When the mortal fully realizes the state of fearless dignity, then his sufferings vanish; so says Kabeer after careful deliberation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਬਟ ਚਲੰਤੇ ਇਹੁ ਮਦੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜੈਸੇ ਖੋਂਦ ਖੁਮਾਰੀ ॥੪॥੩॥
lines.translit: aubatt chalante ihu mad paaeaa jaise khond khumaaree |4|3|
lines.english: Turning away from the world, I have obtained this wine, and I am intoxicated with it. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫੂਟੀ ਆਖੈ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਸੂਝੈ ਬੂਡਿ ਮੂਏ ਬਿਨੁ ਪਾਨੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: foottee aakhai kachhoo na soojhai boodd mooe bin paanee |1|
lines.english: Your eyes are blinded, and you see nothing at all. You drown and die without water. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਕੇ ਲੀਨੇ ਗਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਏਕੈ ਜਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh trisanaa ke leene gat nahee ekai jaanee |
lines.english: You are engrossed with unsatisfied sexual desire and unresolved anger; you do not know the State of the One Lord.
